title: Release Configured User
objective: A user state with release-track metadata present, used to verify release-aware update paths do not lose user intent.

setup.title: Write Release Config
setup.intent: Create release-track config in common config locations.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node -e 'const fs=require("fs"), path=require("path"); const home=process.env.OPENCLAW_HOME; fs.mkdirSync(path.join(home,"config"),{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(home,"config","channel.json"),JSON.stringify({schemaVersion:"kova.fixture.channel.v1",channel:"beta"},null,2)); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(home,".openclaw-channel"),"beta\n");'

cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes state fixture files
